title: (Bullish Signal) TSLA, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Feb 01, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that TSLA's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 72 similar cases where TSLA's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 58 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 81%. Current price $878.84 is above $663.69 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/29/20 - 02/01/21, the price experienced a +26% Uptrend, while the week of 01/25/21 - 02/01/21 shows a -5% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/l7aw3y3b74f61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=d3218da6e0c5c0260c68400f336154c942d90bfb

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on February 01, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on TSLA as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 58 of 72 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

TSLA moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 17, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for TSLA crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 16, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 8 of 13 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 62%.

Following a +4.31% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TSLA advanced for three days, in 253 of 320 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 259 of 310 cases where TSLA Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 84%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/9046681-tesla-tsla-839-81-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-feb-01-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)

comments.author: chatcat2000
comments.body: Well that exploding Space X rocket may not help matters.
